title: Info Pack
description: This modpack will give you maximum information content and optimization!
body:
This modpack based on Fabric and provides maximum information content. In addition to information mods, there are also optimization mods.

## **Optimisation**

The optimization of this modpack is based on the [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and its additions.
![FPS Boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfe993e607a7289217cf35c8cbd0042220ae54ba.png)

## **Functional**

This modpack has a lot of different functions to extract the maximum amount of information from the game without resorting to cheats. There is also support for all [Optifine functions](https://optifine.readthedocs.io/), such as improved zoom, connected textures, detailed animation and particle settings, and the use of shaders.
IMPORTANT: on some servers and projects, some mods from this modpack may be banned, so first ask the administrators to avoid being banned.
Also, this modpack provides a wide variety of tools for players who understand TMC _(Technical Minecraft)_. There are mods for TMC in this modpack like Carpet, Carpet Extra, EssentialAddons, G4mespeed and soon will be more!

## **Mods**

<details>
<summary>Optimisation</summary>

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - A performance optimization mod for Minecraft that greatly improves frame rates and overall game performance.
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Adds a comprehensive settings menu for the Sodium mod, making it easier to configure performance options.
- [FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer) - Reduces the game's frame rate when it is idle or minimized, saving system resources and reducing power consumption.
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Provides various debugging tools and options for mod developers and advanced users.
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - A Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo.
- [ModelFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes various issues with entity models, ensuring they display correctly and without visual glitches.
- [Hold That Chunk](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-that-chunk) - Prevents chunks from unloading when players move away, ensuring entities within those chunks continue to function.
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Automatically reduces the game's frame rate when it is not in focus, saving system resources and improving performance.
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Optimizes game performance by improving frame rates and reducing lag, making Minecraft run smoother on low-end PCs.
- [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) - spark is a performance profiler for Minecraft clients, servers and proxies.
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft.
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) - Adds culling to leaf blocks, providing a huge performance boost over vanilla.
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Reduce block entity FPS lag with almost no compromises, and improve their visuals.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible.
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations.
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack.
- [Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis) - Speed up the loading of your world.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod.
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models.
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) - Optimization mod that focuses on things other than rendering.
- [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry) - Disable the telemetry introduced in 21w38a.
- 1.21, 1.21.1 - [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) - Lets you return to the Title Screen early while your world is still saving in the background!
- 1.21, 1.21.1 - [fast-ip-ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping) - Yeet the laggy reversed DNS lookup for pure IP server addresses.
- 1.21 - [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes) - When crashing, you can go back to the title screen and keep playing, without needing to restart, alongside other things to make crashes more pleasant.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Functional</summary>

- [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit) - A powerful in-game map editor that allows players to create, modify, and manage large areas of terrain and structures.
- [Show Me Your Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin) - Allows players to see the skins of other players in-game, enhancing social interactions.
- [DeathLog](https://modrinth.com/mod/deathlog) - Keeps a log of player deaths, recording information about how and where the player died.
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - Enhances mouse controls, adding features like item scrolling and quick item movement.
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A mod that adds shader support to Minecraft, allowing for enhanced visual effects and improved graphics.
- [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) - Removes the warning prompt when applying resource packs that are not compatible with the current version of Minecraft.
- [RecursiveResources](https://modrinth.com/mod/recursiveresources) - Enhances resource pack features by allowing nested resource packs for better organization and functionality.
- [ClickThrough 2.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough2.0) - Enables interacting with blocks behind entities without accidentally clicking the entities themselves.
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - Disables the chat reporting feature introduced in Minecraft 1.19.1, preventing players from being reported for chat messages.
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - Provides a search bar for keybindings and the ability to filter them, making it easier to manage and find specific controls.
- [ItemPhysic Lite](https://modrinth.com/mod/itemphysic-lite) - Improves item physics by adding realistic item drops, making items float and spin naturally on the ground.
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) - Adds custom eating animations to the game, providing a more immersive experience when consuming food.
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) - Allows players to record their gameplay and create cinematic replays with a powerful and easy-to-use editor.
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - Enhances entity models by adding support for additional custom features and animations.
- [EntityTextureFeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Adds additional customization options for entity textures, allowing for more diverse and unique mobs.
- [Smooth Scrolling Everywhere](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scrolling-refurbished) - Enables smooth scrolling for all in-game GUIs, making navigation through menus more pleasant.
- [MoreChatHistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Expands the chat history size, allowing players to see more previous messages in the chat window.
- [Client Commands](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-commands) - Adds a variety of useful commands for client-side use, such as toggling features and managing settings.
- [Female Gender](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender) - Adds female gender options for player characters, allowing for gender customization in the game.
- [Fadeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/fadeless) - Prevents items from losing their enchantments when they are renamed, preserving their original properties.
- [Xaero's Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaero-zoomout) - Adds a zoom feature to the game, allowing players to zoom in and out for better visibility.
- [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables) - Adds a search bar to various in-game menus, making it easier to find specific items or blocks.
- [Accurate Block Placement Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/accurate-block-placement-reborn) - Makes block placement smarter by timing it for you.
- [I See Lava](https://modrinth.com/mod/i-see-lava) - A simple client-side mod that makes lava transparent like water.
- [CalcMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/calcmod) - A calculator in your chat with shortcuts designed for Minecraft.
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods.
- [Command GUI Buttons](https://modrinth.com/mod/command-gui-buttons) - A fabric mod can create custom command buttons on players' clients.
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures.
- 1.21 [Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dynamic-lights) - Supported entities and items such as torches or lanterns emit light! Server-side only!
- [Entity View Distance](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-view-distance) - This mods allows more precise manipulation of entity view distance on client and server.
- [EssentialGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/essentialgui) - Small mod that adds fancy and useful information on screen.
- [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) - Makes the explosion animation look cooler.
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks.
- [G4mespeed](https://modrinth.com/mod/g4mespeed) - Utility mod for improving the reliability and experience of changing tick rate, as well as many quality of life features. This is also the core mod required for G4mespeed extensions.
- [Gamma Utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) - Gamma / Brightness / Night Vision mod, making it easy to see in the dark. Basically Fullbright for Fabric.
- [Highlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlight) - Highlight changes the visualization of specific blocks in the game to have more aligned selections to their models.
- [LAN World Plug-n-Play (mcwifipnp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcwifipnp) - Allows you to change the port number of the LAN world and choose whether to map this port to the public network using UPnP.
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages.
- [Lava Clear View](https://modrinth.com/mod/lava-clear-view) - Allow you to see more easily under lava when you have fire resistance.
- 1.21 [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort) - A client-only implementation of Siphalor's Mouse Wheelie sorting algorithm.
- [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty) - The Light Overlay Mod with a twist!
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
- [Mod Settings](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-settings) - Provides an easy to access configuration screen for all installed mods on Fabric.
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Increases the maximum length of chat history.
- [My Totem Doll](https://modrinth.com/mod/my_totem_doll) - Simple Fabric mod which replaces all totems with player dolls. Rename your totem to player's nickname to use it's skin.
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person.
- [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer) - Adds a highly-configurable zoom key. The zoom is yours!
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) - Makes resource packs load in the background, allowing you to do other things while waiting!
- [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) - In-game resource pack, data pack and shader browser and updater.
- [Screenshots](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshots) - Adds some more functionality to screenshots like cropping and copying to clipboard.
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory.
- [Simple Shulker Preview](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-shulker-preview) - A minecraft fabric mod that displays a configurable icon indicating the contents of a shulker box, as well as a capacity bar.
- [Title Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/title-fixer) - Simple client side mod that makes titles displayed on-screen always fit inside the screen space.
- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds) - Changes the renderer of the bed to use json models instead of a block entity renderer!
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) - Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount.
- [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper) - Inventory update concept for hotswapping items.
- [Better Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/brb) - Adds brewing, smithing, and QOL changes to the vanilla recipe book.
- [Perspektive](https://modrinth.com/mod/perspektive) - Freelook/Perspective mod for Fabric.
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) - Take full control over your vanilla game.
- [Carpet Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-extra) - Extra Features for Carpet Mod.
- [Essential Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/essentialaddons) - A Carpet Extension that provides many useful gameplay features as well as useful creative tools many ported from the Essentials plugin.
- [TweakerMore](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakermore) - A collection of client-side tweak kits to enhance your Minecraft game experience. Tweak Minecraft and beyond!
- [Litematica by sakura-ryoko](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/litematica/releases) -  Schematic mod with many functions.
- [Visible Barriers](https://modrinth.com/mod/visiblebarriers) - Making barriers visible and other mapmaking help.
- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) - The all-in-one tool for editing Minecraft Worlds.
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles.
- [Hat List](https://modrinth.com/mod/hatlist) - Show the hat layer on tab list.
- [skin overrides](https://modrinth.com/mod/skin-overrides) - a simple mod for locally changing skins and capes.
- [No Darkness Effect](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-darkness-effect) - Client-side mod which completely removes darkness effect.
- [Main Menu Credits](https://modrinth.com/mod/main-menu-credits) - Adds a way of adding information to the user's title screen.
- 1.21.1 - [Hat Layer](https://modrinth.com/mod/hat-layer) - Ensures the hat layer of skins always appears in the tab list.
- 1.21.1 - [Concentration](https://modrinth.com/mod/concentration) - Borderless fullscreen support for Minecraft 1.20.6+.
- 1.21.1 - [Screenshot to Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard) - Screenshots taken are copied to the clipboard.
- 1.21 - [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) - A mod that allows you to play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window.
- 1.21, 1.21.1 - [Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo) - Various client-side tweaks, such as hand restock, hotbar swap/cycle, flexible/fast block placement etc.
- 1.21, 1.21.1 - [BreakFree](https://modrinth.com/mod/breakfree) - Lets you keep breaking blocks when you switch items.
- 1.21 - [No Mining Cooldown](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mining-cooldown) - Fixes the client-side block breaking delay.
- 1.20.1 [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - Borderless window for Minecraft.
- 1.20.1 [Carpet-Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-fixes) - The carpet extension to fix all vanilla minecraft bugs
- 1.20.1 [Screenshot Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-viewer) - View your screenshots in game!
- 1.20.1 [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-sorting) - Quick, simple, and lightweight inventory sorting
- 1.20.1 [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - A dynamic lights mod for Fabric.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Interface</summary>

- [CustomHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/customhud) - Allows players to customize their in-game HUD, adding or removing elements and changing their appearance.
- [ShulkerBoxTooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - Displays the contents of shulker boxes in a tooltip when hovering over them, making it easy to see what's inside without opening them.
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Displays detailed food and hunger-related information, such as the saturation and exhaustion values of food items.
- [Held Item Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-info) - Displays detailed information about the item the player is holding, such as enchantments, durability, and more.
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) - Improves the advancements GUI by adding various customization options and better navigation.
- [Better Ping Display (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Displays detailed ping information, showing latency to the server and other players.
- [Stendhal](https://modrinth.com/mod/stendhal) - A content mod that adds new items, blocks, and features inspired by the Stendhal MMORPG.
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - A customizable minimap mod that adds a mini-map to the in-game UI, showing terrain, entities, and waypoints.
- [ChatAnimation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation) - Adds animations to chat messages, making them more visually appealing and dynamic.
- [ChatPatches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches) - Fixes various issues with the in-game chat system, improving its functionality and reliability.
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - See who you're chatting with!
- [Command Block UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettercommandblockui) - Provides a more usable Command Block UI.
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - A Minecraft mod that improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful.
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.
- [Blur+ (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric) - Adds a blur effect to all GUI backgrounds.
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu.
- [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) - More detail about armor in Armor bar!
- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) - A mod that hides or changes the crosshair dependent on context.
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - Shows information about what you are looking at.
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - View Items and Recipes.
- [Inventory HUD +](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge) - Tthe mod will show all your items right above the hotbar, display information about the armor on the side of the hotbar, show the duration of the active effects.
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world. Works great together with Xaero's Minimap.
- [Edgeless Chat Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/edgeless-chat-screen) - Why not having an edgeless chat screen?
- [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) - Makes the loading screen darker.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Sounds</summary>

- [Cicada](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada) - Enhances Minecraft's ambient sounds, adding more immersive and natural environmental audio.
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) - ..An Overly complicated Sound Mod...
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) - A Minecraft mod that provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.
- [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - #listentonature

</details>
